Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: Imagine that you're cutting your nails... or picking at your skin... or whatever humans do for relaxation. It's warm outside, but inside is hotter than a volcano -- so you might as well get some fresh air.

Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: You just so happen to be in the canopy of an eons-old Kweebec Ancient, and it's at least a little chillier up here than what all of those losers on the ground have to deal with.

Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: It's not enough, though. Unlike below, there's no point to hoping for a serious cover of clouds up here. There's a minor drought, too, so Kweebdrasil can't pull up too much water for you to bathe in.

Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: But something managed to form up here. You know better than to hope for them to puff up as much as rain clouds do, but water is water. And the wisps of a cirrus seem to have caught onto the tree.

Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: You run out. You tear all your pointless coverings off yourself, like those Ferans from a while ago, and welcome the cloud...

Line.Text: ...and then you mammals need to be treated for thermal shock. Some Kweebec yells at you about having told you so.

Choices.Text: Surely it can't be that bad.
